summary: Testing iteration 41: Verified refactoring did not break existing functionality. All backend tests (18/18) passed. Frontend UI tests verified Super Admin login, Monitoring tab with alerts, Tenant impersonation dialog, RBAC enforcement, and data isolation.
critical_code_review_comments: Dependencies in /app/backend/utils/dependencies.py correctly implement RBAC - get_tenant_admin and require_tenant both block super_admin from tenant operations
ContextVar-based database proxy in /app/backend/config/database.py ensures data isolation
Impersonation endpoint correctly generates JWT with tenant_id claim for database routing
Monitoring endpoint returns complete structure: tenants, summary, and alerts with correct severity levels
All SaaS management routes (/api/saas/*) correctly accessible by super_admin
seed_data_creation: Test products and customers created and cleaned up during isolation tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 requested features verified after refactoring: 1) Super Admin login returns user_type='admin' and can access /api/saas/* endpoints, 2) Monitoring tab shows alerts (expired=critical, expiring=warning), tenant stats, and summary totals, 3) Tenant impersonation works - clicking tenant name shows dialog with 'دخول للحساب' button, 4) RBAC enforced - Super Admin gets 403 on /api/products, /api/customers, /api/sales, /api/expenses, 5) Data isolation - Tenant A cannot see Tenant B's data.

super_admin_login.notes: Returns correct user_type and can access SaaS management endpoints

monitoring_dashboard.notes: Returns tenants array with stats, summary totals, and alerts with correct severity

rbac_enforcement.notes: Super Admin blocked from /api/products (403), /api/customers (403), /api/sales (403), /api/expenses (403), but CAN access /api/saas/tenants (200)

data_isolation.notes: Tenant A cannot see Tenant B's products or customers

impersonation_feature.notes: Endpoint exists, returns tenant context token, impersonated token can access tenant data

frontend_ui.super_admin_dashboard: PASS - SaaS Admin page loads with all tabs
frontend_ui.monitoring_tab: PASS - Shows 2 alerts (amir expired, farid expiring), stats summary, tenant table
frontend_ui.impersonation_dialog: PASS - Dialog shows tenant details with 'دخول للحساب' button
frontend_ui.tenant_dashboard: PASS - Tenant A sees their own dashboard, not SaaS Admin
